hero.h1: You ship code. Your agent should know your stack.
hero.lead: 40 curated Agent Skills for TYPO3, PHP, Go, Docker, Jira, security, and documentation — portable across Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, Gemini CLI, and 30+ other agents.

problem.h2: Generic AI misses the conventions you ship against every day

items.title: TYPO3 conventions
items.body: Generic agents don't know PSR-12 quirks, TCA, FlexForms, or how DDEV expects extensions to be wired.

items.title: Hardening expectations
items.body: Supply-chain security, SBOMs, OpenSSF Scorecard, signed releases — not the defaults out of the box.

items.title: Operational shape
items.body: Concourse pipelines, Matrix notifications, Jira workflows, Netresearch CI — generic suggestions need rework.

marketplace.h2: One install. Forty skills. Every supported agent.

improvementLoop.lead: A small family of skills whose subject matter is other skills. At the centre runs a loop — Harness onboards your repo, Assessment audits the work against the same checkpoints we publish, and Retro feeds every friction back into rules, checkpoints, and skill PRs — including the harness itself. Around the loop sit five more skill-skills handling authoring and host-side concerns.

nodes.title: Harness
nodes.body: AGENTS.md as index, docs/ structure, CI verification, enforcement mechanisms — the scaffolding every other skill assumes.

nodes.title: Assessment
nodes.body: Runs checkpoint-enabled skills against the codebase — coverage, mutation score, release readiness, mechanical and LLM-assisted reviews.

nodes.title: Retro
nodes.body: Detects friction across a session and materialises it into user memory, project rules, skill PRs, checkpoints, or harness artefacts.

improvementLoop.loopBack: Retro feeds learnings back into Harness, Assessment checkpoints, and every other skill in this catalog.
improvementLoop.companionsLead: Authoring tools that produce inputs for the loop, plus host-side tooling that gets skills into non-Claude-Code projects.

companions.title: agent-rules
companions.body: Generates the AGENTS.md content that Harness installs as a repo's index.

companions.title: /add-checkpoints
companions.body: Sub-command of automated-assessment that adds checkpoints to a skill so Assessment can audit against them.

companions.title: skill-repo
companions.body: Templates and validation for authoring new Agent Skills — split licensing, plugin.json, release workflow.

companions.title: composer-agent-skill-plugin
companions.body: Composer plugin that pulls Agent Skills into PHP projects regardless of which AI agent reads them.

companions.title: node-agent-skill-coordinator
companions.body: Discovers skills shipped via npm packages and registers them in the project's AGENTS.md.

improvementLoop.browseCta: Browse the skill-skills group in the catalog

categoriesSection.lead: Skills grouped by the surfaces they touch. Categories are the AGENTS.md canonical enum; thematic groupings are surface for discovery.

story.body1: Netresearch DTT GmbH is a TYPO3 agency in Leipzig that ships production LMS, e-commerce, and enterprise CMS workloads daily. These skills aren't experiments — they are the patterns our engineers reach for on real client work.
story.body2: We open-source the patterns we trust ourselves with. Every skill in this marketplace runs on at least one Netresearch project.

steps.title: 3. Or use it from any agent

openStandard.body: Built on the Agent Skills spec — portable across Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, Amp, Goose, Roo Code, OpenCode, and 30+ more agents.

cta.h2: Use it. Improve it. Submit your own.

footer.maintained: Maintained by Netresearch DTT GmbH, Leipzig.
